titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Theodore Ole Osmundson papers, 1979-1980.
titlestmt.author: Compiled by RMC Staff

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library

profiledesc.creation: Finding aid encoded by RMC Staff, March 2016

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

titlepage.titleproper: Guide to the Theodore Ole Osmundson Papers,1979-1980.
titlepage.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections Cornell University Library

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu

did.head: DESCRIPTIVE SUMMARY
did.repository: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library
did.abstract: Two articles by Osmundson published in LANDSCAPE ARCHITECTURE magazine.

bioghist.head: BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
bioghist.p: Member, International Fraternity of Lambda Alpha, Golden Gate Chapter.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Two articles by Osmundson published in LANDSCAPE ARCHITECTURE magazine: "Engineers Relax Controls to Get a Living Levee," November 1980; and "The Changing Technique of Roof Garden Design," September 1979.

controlaccess.head: Names:
controlaccess.corpname: Lambda Alpha International. Golden Gate Chapter.

odd.head: NOTES
odd.p: Part of Lambda Alpha Literary Archives.

did.unittitle: "The Changing Technique of Roof Garden Design," by Osmundson in LANDSCAPE ARCHITECTURE magazine
"Engineers Relax Controls to Get a Living Levee" by Osmundson in LANDSCAPE ARCHITECTURE magazine

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Theodore Ole Osmundson Papers, #3597. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
